Bob Dylan, 8/13/90, Edmonton, Alberta, Canada, Jubilee Auditorium, 2CDR

Sourced from LB-4927: (51min+45min), Audience recording > Unknown transfer > CDR (x) > EAC (Secure/Offset) > FLAC (Level 8);; a little harsh; very good sound [B]

CD1
1. Maggie's Farm, 2. Shelter From The Storm, 3. No More One More Time, 4. Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again, 5. Masters Of War, 6. Gotta Serve Somebody, 7. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding), 8. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue, 9. Gates Of Eden, 

CD2
10. Mr. Tambourine Man, 11. Everything Is Broken, 12. Queen Jane Approximately, 13. Political World, 14. All Along The Watchtower, 15. I Shall Be Released, 16. Like A Rolling Stone, 17. Blowin' In The Wind, 18. Highway 61 Revisited
